subTitle: Titoo's grandfather returns from an old age home with a sour disposition. However, determined to lift his spirits, Titoo teaches him new skills.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera befriends Titoo's doppelganger, plotting to tarnish Titoo's reputation. However, Titoo secretly teams up with his look-alike to outwit Shera.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo wants to collect 20 coins from an oatmeal he dislikes to win a video game. However, he decides to throw a health party to gain coins sooner, but Shrea wants to disrupt his plan.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's parents give each other the silent treatment, causing familial tension. However, Titoo concocts a series of amusing scenarios to rekindle their affection.

subTitle: During a camping trip, Titoo and Shera vie for a prized cap. However, as Titoo takes the lead, Shera hatches a devious plan to sabotage his chances of winning.

subTitle: Titoo makes a secret plan with his brother and a magician to teach a lesson to the kids in his class for scaring him with fake ghosts.

subTitle: A gang of helmet-clad thieves plunders the town, leaving residents bereft. As a result, Titoo springs into action to bring them to justice.

subTitle: Titoo's father dreads a school meeting due to past misdeeds. However, Titoo cleverly manipulates events to ensure his father attends.

subTitle: Titoo's father becomes inconvenienced when a bird's nest gets entangled in his hair. Consequently, Titoo decides to teach the culprit responsible a lesson.

subTitle: Titoo's life takes an unexpected turn when he meets a talking parrot. Subsequently, the bird quickly becomes his friend, offering peculiar solutions to Titoo's insomnia.

subTitle: When an illegal construction threatens to destroy the town's beloved playground, Titoo organises a hunger strike in an attempt to halt the demolition.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo brings home a stray puppy he found on the street, but Golu is deathly afraid of dogs. So Titoo sets out to help Golu conquer his fears.

title: Titoo
subTitle: In order to annoy Shera, Golu claims that Titoo is actually the topper in class. So now, in order to not humiliate Golu, Titoo is forced to ace the exams and prove him right.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo, an inspiring eight-year-old boy, wishes to help everyone in need. However, his attempts only get him into trouble.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's mother starts to put pressure on him to make sure that her dream of him becoming a doctor comes true. But Titoo turns it around on her by misdiagnosing people and showing her she was wrong.

title: Titoo
subTitle: When Titoo's mother is annoyed by how much Titoo talks, he decides to take a vow of silence until his mother is satisfied. But soon Titoo's attempts to communicate using non verbal signs causes chaos.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera starts to become jealous of how much attention Titoo's pranks are getting. So he comes up with a plan to stop Titoo from playing any more pranks.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Sheru tries to cheat during a speech competition by sneaking into the principal's office to learn all the topics beforehand. But Titoo finds out and devises a plan to stop him.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera accuses Titoo of littering and has him clean up the mess that others had made. But Titoo soon turns the task into a game and has his friends join in to help.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo and Golu decide to inhale lightweight gas to float around the city. But during their adventure they spot some robbers heisting a bank and decide to stop them.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Golu's mother plans to sell their cherished table, devastating him. However, Titoo and Golu embark on a frantic mission to save it.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's grandfather returns from an old age home with a sour disposition. However, determined to lift his spirits, Titoo teaches him new skills.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Shera befriends Titoo's doppelganger, plotting to tarnish Titoo's reputation. However, Titoo secretly teams up with his look-alike to outwit Shera.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo wants to collect 20 coins from an oatmeal he dislikes to win a video game. However, he decides to throw a health party to gain coins sooner, but Shrea wants to disrupt his plan.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's parents give each other the silent treatment, causing familial tension. However, Titoo concocts a series of amusing scenarios to rekindle their affection.

title: Titoo
subTitle: During a camping trip, Titoo and Shera vie for a prized cap. However, as Titoo takes the lead, Shera hatches a devious plan to sabotage his chances of winning.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo makes a secret plan with his brother and a magician to teach a lesson to the kids in his class for scaring him with fake ghosts.

title: Titoo
subTitle: A gang of helmet-clad thieves plunders the town, leaving residents bereft. As a result, Titoo springs into action to bring them to justice.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's father dreads a school meeting due to past misdeeds. However, Titoo cleverly manipulates events to ensure his father attends.

title: Titoo
subTitle: Titoo's father becomes inconvenienced when a bird's nest gets entangled in his hair. Consequently, Titoo decides to teach the culprit responsible a lesson.

subTitle: Kris and his friends head to the Arctic in order to witness the magnificent Northern Lights in person. But soon Kanishk arrives in a monstrous form to ruin their experience.

subTitle: When Choocha's dream remains unfinished, Hunny suggests he should go back to sleep and finish the incomplete dream.
